summary: Grace Front Page Greeter implementation testing complete. Backend: 12/14 tests passed (2 skipped due to no admin credentials). Frontend: Grace welcome page loads correctly with opening message, chat functionality, Enter key to send, and skip button. All core features verified.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - Grace avatar not served via /api/avatars endpoint. However, the avatar exists at /frontend/public/images/grace.png and is correctly referenced in the frontend.

integration_issues.issue: Action buttons (e.g., 'Yes, take me to Tommy') only appear when Grace mentions specific internal personas/routes. When Grace mentions external resources (like CTP), no action buttons appear. This is by design per the parseNavigationActions function.

critical_code_review_comments: Grace persona file (/app/backend/personas/grace.py) is well-structured with comprehensive prompt covering QARANC background, signposting, navigation, and safeguarding protocols
Grace is correctly registered in /app/backend/personas/__init__.py as persona #21
Grace greeter endpoints (GET/PUT /api/settings/grace-greeter) are correctly implemented with admin-only PUT access
Frontend grace-welcome.tsx has proper breathing logo animation, chat interface, and navigation action parsing
index.tsx correctly checks Grace toggle state and redirects when enabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grace greeter implementation is complete and working. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_grace_greeter.py. The Grace toggle defaults to OFF. When ON, users see Grace first on the splash screen. Grace's chat works via the standard /api/ai-buddies/chat endpoint with character='grace'.

backend.PUT /api/settings/grace-greeter: PASS - Requires admin auth (returns 401 without token)
backend.POST /api/ai-buddies/chat with character: PASS - Returns valid response with Grace's persona
backend.Grace safeguarding: PASS - Triggers safeguarding for crisis messages (RED level)
backend.Grace prompt contains key elements: PASS - QARANC, signposting, navigation, Tommy, peer support, counsellors

frontend.Grace opening message: PASS - 'Hello. I'm Grace. Welcome to Radio Check. Take a breath — you've found the right place. What's brought you here today?'
frontend.Grace avatar displayed: PASS - grace.png shown with green border
frontend.Breathing logo animation: PASS - Logo animates (useNativeDriver warning is expected on web)
frontend.Chat response: PASS - Grace responds to user messages

files_verified./app/backend/personas/grace.py: Grace persona with full prompt - 300 lines
files_verified./app/frontend/app/index.tsx: Grace redirect check when toggle ON
